title: Two brazilian ships in the Atlantic Ocean reported a large UFO sighting [1986]
excerpt: August 18, 1986. – Occurrence transcript released in the Chief Controller’s Assistant book – “At 19:14, the ACC-BS [Area Control Center of Brasília-DF] received information that two ships that were in the coordinates 1830S/03850W reported to EMBRATEL’s coastal station that they saw a large unidentified flying object heading towards the Northwest. “ Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL […]
text_preview:
August 18, 1986. – Occurrence transcript released in the Chief Controller’s Assistant book – “At 19:14, the ACC-BS [Area Control Center of Brasília-DF] received information that two ships that were in the coordinates 1830S/03850W reported to EMBRATEL’s coastal station that they saw a large unidentified flying object heading towards the Northwest. “

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.247. “Transcrição de ocorrências de avistamento de objetos voadores não identif
summary: On Aug 18, 1986, two Brazilian ships at coordinates 18°30'S/38°50'W in the Atlantic Ocean reported a large UFO heading northwest to EMBRATEL coastal station.
